name: Stamped.io Reviews and Loyalty API
what_it_does: Stamped.io REST API for customer reviews, ratings, and loyalty program platform for ecommerce. Enables AI agents to retrieve product reviews and NPS data, manage loyalty points and rewards, trigger review request campaigns, access UGC analytics, and integrate Stamped into ecommerce and CRM workflows. Supports Shopify, WooCommerce, and BigCommerce.
use_cases: Retrieving product reviews and ratings from ecommerce analytics agents
Managing loyalty points and rewards from customer retention agents
Triggering NPS surveys from post-purchase order management agents
Integrating Stamped review and loyalty data into CRM personalization agents
not_for: Enterprise review management outside ecommerce context
B2B SaaS without consumer ecommerce presence
best_when: An ecommerce brand using Stamped.io wants AI agents to analyze customer reviews, manage loyalty rewards, and integrate UGC into marketing campaigns.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Customer review and loyalty data includes personal opinions and purchase history. GDPR compliance required. Marketing automation must respect unsubscribe preferences.

auth.notes: Stamped.io API uses store hash and API key authentication. Public and private API keys available in Stamped dashboard. Public key for frontend, private key for server-side.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan: up to 50 orders/month, basic review features
pricing.paid_tiers: Basic, Premium, Business, and Professional plans scaling orders and features
pricing.notes: Canadian company. Competitive with Yotpo on pricing. Loyalty and NPS available on higher plans.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Customer review data and purchase history requires GDPR compliance
No public MCP server — REST API with API key auth
Separate public and private API keys — use private key server-side only
Canadian company — CA data residency option
Loyalty program API is separate from reviews API — may have different auth or rate limits
agent_readiness.security_notes: Customer review and loyalty PII. SOC2, GDPR. Separate public/private API keys. CA data residency.

security_score_components.security_notes: Customer review and loyalty data. SOC2, GDPR. Public/private API key separation. CA data residency.
